---
title: "Resources"
title-block-style: none
description: "Access chen.ist's collection of tools, guides, templates, and reference materials for cybersecurity, cloud, and software development."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Helpful <span class="gr">Resources</span></h1>
    <p>Tools, guides, templates, and presentations to help you build better infrastructure.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-squares">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Browse by format</h2>
    <p class="sub">Everything we publish, available in the format you prefer.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-book"></i><h3>Guides</h3><p>In-depth walkthroughs for security, cloud, and APIs.</p><a href="/resources/guides/" class="m-lk">Browse guides</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-easel"></i><h3>Presentations</h3><p>Interactive keynotes and slide decks.</p><a href="/keynotes/" class="m-lk">View presentations</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i><h3>Templates</h3><p>Ready-to-use security policies, IR plans, and project docs.</p><a href="/resources/templates/" class="m-lk">Download templates</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-tools"></i><h3>Tools</h3><p>Password checker, zero trust assessment, and more.</p><a href="/resources/tools/" class="m-lk">Access tools</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Browse by topic</h2>
    <p class="sub">Find resources for your specific domain.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security</h3><p>Implementation guides, best practices, and compliance checklists.</p><a href="/resources/guides/security/implementation-guide.html" class="m-lk">Explore</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud</h3><p>Migration handbooks, cost optimization, and architecture guides.</p><a href="/resources/guides/cloud/migration-handbook.html" class="m-lk">Explore</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i><h3>Development</h3><p>API references, endpoint documentation, and integration guides.</p><a href="/resources/guides/api/endpoints.html" class="m-lk">Explore</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-squares">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/analyst-monitors.webp" alt="Security resources"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Featured:<br>Security Best Practices</h2>
        <p>A comprehensive guide to implementing robust security practices in your organization. Covers access control, encryption, monitoring, and incident response procedures.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/resources/guides/security/implementation-guide.html" class="m-lk">Read the guide</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/datacenter-blue.webp" alt="Cloud resources"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Featured:<br>Cloud Migration Handbook</h2>
        <p>Step-by-step strategies for a successful cloud migration. Assessment, planning, execution, and optimization — with minimal disruption to your operations.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/resources/guides/cloud/migration-handbook.html" class="m-lk">Read the handbook</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-squares">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Latest presentations</h2>
    <p class="sub">Keynotes and talks from our team.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Zero Trust Security</h3><p>Principles and implementation strategies for zero trust architecture.</p><a href="/resources/keynotes/zero-trust-security/" class="m-lk">View</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-check"></i><h3>Cloud Security</h3><p>Key strategies for securing cloud environments across major providers.</p><a href="/keynotes/cloud-security/" class="m-lk">View</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i><h3>Cyber Awareness</h3><p>Essential practices for digital protection and security hygiene.</p><a href="/keynotes/cyberawareness/" class="m-lk">View</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need something specific?</h2>
    <p>Our team can help you find the right resources for your project.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a call</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
